meaning: n.人,家伙,伙伴,学会特别会员,朋友,同事adj.同伴的,同事的,同道的
examples: He was a young fellow, very green, very immature.
He crossed out "fellow subjects," and instead inserted "fellow citizens."
He was a meek, mild-mannered fellow.
Joel Kotkin is a presidential fellow at Chapman University and executive editor of newgeography.com.
She is married to fellow journalist John Roberts and are proud parents of twins.
